faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Laurelton?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Laurelton typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What are the signs of termites in my Laurelton home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, mud tubes along foundation walls, discarded wings near windows or doors, small holes in wood, and visible frass (termite droppings). If you notice any of these warning signs in your Laurelton property, contact us immediately for a professional inspection to assess the damage and recommend treatment options.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Laurelton?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Laurelton homes can be completed in 4-8 hours depending on the property size and treatment method. Liquid barrier treatments are typically finished in one day, while baiting systems require initial installation followed by monitoring visits. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite warranties for Laurelton properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite warranties for all our Laurelton clients. Our warranties typically include annual inspections and retreatment if termites return during the coverage period. We'll explain all warranty terms during your initial consultation and customize protection plans to suit your property's specific needs.
